name: Animated Counter Example
description: Demonstrates an animated counter with configurable step duration and transition effects between each number change.

inputs.label: Frames Per Number
inputs.description: How many frames each number stays visible before transitioning to the next

inputs.label: Transition Effect
inputs.description: Visual effect when the number changes

AnimatedCounter.code: function AnimatedCounter(props) { var from = Number(props.from) || 0; var to = Number(props.to) || 100; var fps = Math.max(1, Number(props.framesPerStep) || 10); var tr = props.transition || 'slideUp'; var color = props.color || '#4ecdc4'; var frame = props.frame || 0; var total = Math.abs(to - from); var dir = to >= from ? 1 : -1; var si = Math.min(Math.floor(frame / fps), total); var cur = from + si * dir; var nxt = from + Math.min(si + 1, total) * dir; var tf = Math.max(3, Math.floor(fps * 0.35)); var fis = frame - si * fps; var isTr = si < total && fis >= (fps - tf); var t = isTr ? (fis - (fps - tf)) / tf : 0; var e = t < 0.5 ? 4*t*t*t : 1 - Math.pow(-2*t+2, 3)/2; var sz = '120px'; var b = { position:'absolute', width:'100%', textAlign:'center', fontSize:sz, fontWeight:'bold', color:color, fontFamily:'monospace', lineHeight:'1' }; var wrap = { position:'relative', width:'100%', height:'100%', overflow:'hidden' }; var ctr = { position:'relative', width:'100%', height:'100%', display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center', overflow:'hidden' }; var txt = { fontSize:sz, fontWeight:'bold', color:color, fontFamily:'monospace', textAlign:'center' }; if (tr === 'none' || tr === 'cut' || !isTr) { return React.createElement('div', {style:ctr}, React.createElement('div', {style:txt}, (isTr && tr==='cut') ? nxt : cur)); } var o = {}; var i = {}; if (tr==='fade') { o={opacity:1-e}; i={opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='slideUp') { o={transform:'translateY('+(-e*100)+'%)',opacity:1-e*0.5}; i={transform:'translateY('+((1-e)*100)+'%)',opacity:0.5+e*0.5}; } else if (tr==='slideDown') { o={transform:'translateY('+(e*100)+'%)',opacity:1-e*0.5}; i={transform:'translateY('+(-(1-e)*100)+'%)',opacity:0.5+e*0.5}; } else if (tr==='slideLeft') { o={transform:'translateX('+(-e*100)+'%)',opacity:1-e*0.5}; i={transform:'translateX('+((1-e)*100)+'%)',opacity:0.5+e*0.5}; } else if (tr==='slideRight') { o={transform:'translateX('+(e*100)+'%)',opacity:1-e*0.5}; i={transform:'translateX('+(-(1-e)*100)+'%)',opacity:0.5+e*0.5}; } else if (tr==='zoom') { o={transform:'scale('+(1-e)+')',opacity:1-e}; i={transform:'scale('+e+')',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='scale') { o={transform:'scale('+(1+e*0.5)+')',opacity:1-e}; i={transform:'scale('+(0.5+e*0.5)+')',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='flip') { var a=e*180; if(a<=90){o={transform:'perspective(400px) rotateX('+a+'deg)',opacity:1};i={transform:'perspective(400px) rotateX(-180deg)',opacity:0};} else{o={transform:'perspective(400px) rotateX(90deg)',opacity:0};i={transform:'perspective(400px) rotateX('+(180-a)+'deg)',opacity:1};} } else if (tr==='rotate') { o={transform:'rotate('+(e*90)+'deg) scale('+(1-e*0.5)+')',opacity:1-e}; i={transform:'rotate('+((1-e)*-90)+'deg) scale('+(0.5+e*0.5)+')',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='blur') { o={filter:'blur('+(e*12)+'px)',opacity:1-e}; i={filter:'blur('+((1-e)*12)+'px)',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='wipe') { o={clipPath:'inset(0 '+(e*100)+'% 0 0)'}; i={clipPath:'inset(0 0 0 '+((1-e)*100)+'%)'}; } else if (tr==='circle') { o={clipPath:'circle('+(150*(1-e))+'% at 50% 50%)'}; i={clipPath:'circle('+(150*e)+'% at 50% 50%)'}; } else if (tr==='iris') { o={clipPath:'circle('+(100*(1-e))+'% at 50% 50%)'}; i={clipPath:'circle('+(100*e)+'% at 50% 50%)'}; } else if (tr==='push') { o={transform:'translateX('+(-e*100)+'%)'}; i={transform:'translateX('+((1-e)*100)+'%)'}; } else if (tr==='crosszoom') { o={transform:'scale('+(1+e*0.5)+')',opacity:1-e}; i={transform:'scale('+(0.5+e*0.5)+')',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='glitch') { var seed=Math.floor(e*100); var ox=((seed*9301+49297)%233280)/233280*20-10; var oy=((seed*421+2038074743)%2147483647)/2147483647*20-10; o={transform:'translate('+ox+'px,'+oy+'px)',opacity:1-e,filter:e>0.3?'hue-rotate('+(e*360)+'deg)':'none'}; i={transform:e>0.7?'translate('+(-ox)+'px,'+(-oy)+'px)':'none',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='dissolve') { var px=Math.floor(e*20); o={filter:px>0?'blur('+px+'px)':'none',opacity:1-e}; i={filter:px>0?'blur('+((1-e)*20)+'px)':'none',opacity:e}; } else if (tr==='cube') { var ca=e*90; o={transform:'perspective(2000px) rotateY('+ca+'deg) translateZ(-200px)',opacity:e>0.5?0:1}; i={transform:'perspective(2000px) rotateY('+((1-e)*-90)+'deg) translateZ(-200px)',opacity:e>0.5?1:0}; } else if (tr==='swirl') { o={transform:'rotate('+(e*180)+'deg) scale('+(1-e)+')',opacity:1-e,filter:'blur('+(e*10)+'px)'}; i={transform:'rotate('+((1-e)*-180)+'deg) scale('+e+')',opacity:e,filter:'blur('+((1-e)*10)+'px)'}; } else if (tr==='diagonal-wipe') { var dw=e*150; o={clipPath:'polygon(0 0, '+(100-dw)+'% 0, 0 '+(100-dw)+'%, 0 0)'}; i={clipPath:'polygon(100% 100%, '+dw+'% 100%, 100% '+dw+'%, 100% 100%)'}; } else { o={opacity:1-e}; i={opacity:e}; } return React.createElement('div', {style:wrap}, React.createElement('div', {style:Object.assign({},b,{top:'50%',left:0,transform:(o.transform||'')+' translateY(-50%)',opacity:o.opacity!==undefined?o.opacity:1,filter:o.filter||'none',clipPath:o.clipPath||'none'})}, cur), React.createElement('div', {style:Object.assign({},b,{top:'50%',left:0,transform:(i.transform||'')+' translateY(-50%)',opacity:i.opacity!==undefined?i.opacity:1,filter:i.filter||'none',clipPath:i.clipPath||'none'})}, nxt)); }
AnimatedCounter.description: Stepped animated counter with all system transition effects
